title: Banská Bystrica、Banská Bystrica Region — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Banská Bystrica、Banská Bystrica Regionの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Banská BystricaはBanská Bystrica Regionにある人口76,018の都市です。A historic mining town in central Slovakia, the center of the Slovak National Uprising, surrounded by the Low Tatras mountains with excellent hiking and skiing.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
